query: Use smahties to find where the repository handles plugin marketplace manifest loading, even if the exact symbol name is not obvious.
Run a semantic code search for the part of this codebase that decides which plugin skills are available.
Index plugins/smahties with the local code-search MCP server before searching it.
Check the smahties index status and tell me whether the queue has pending work.
List indexed TypeScript code units under plugins/azure-devops, including source snippets if available.
Use ripgrep to find the exact string "marketplace.json" in this repository.
Search the web for recent MCP server marketplace examples.
Open plugins/smahties/README.md and summarize the install instructions.
